core_payload.content:
# Example Project Hub

This example hub groups the public note, task, and validator smoke capsules into one minimal project-shaped reference object.

neuro_concentrate.summary: This example capsule demonstrates a small project hub on the public specification surface. Unlike the standalone note and task examples, the hub carries outbound links so readers can see how a capsule graph starts to form even in a tiny public example set. The hub is marked active because it represents a live organizing node rather than an isolated draft. Its role is educational: it shows how multiple example capsules can coexist as one small reference graph while remaining simple enough for tooling, documentation, and validator exercises that want a compact but linked public example.
